etimesViral video claims Pakistan on ‘Indian spy alert’ after Dhurandhar 2 - here’s the truthFollowing the success of Ranveer Singh's film 'Dhurandhar 2', a viral video of Pakistani police conducting street checks was falsely linked to the movie. The footage, actually from an older operation in Karachi, sparked online speculation of a spy hunt. This incident highlights how easily the internet can misinterpret events, creating a fictional narrative around real-life occurrences.

etimesWatch: Viral video shows how robots are replacing delivery riders in DubaiA viral video from Dubai showcases a food delivery experience unlike any other, with a robot named Rover completing the entire process. An Indian man, Harish Kumar, documented how the robot autonomously delivered his order, with users controlling the lid via their phones. This technological advancement has sparked excitement about convenience and efficiency, alongside questions regarding safety and potential tampering.
